task_name: HDFS DataNode Log - Storage and Capacity Analysis
notes: Excellent execution. Agent correctly identified all 4 confirmed blocks (91,178, 233,217, 11,971, 11,977 bytes), calculated correct statistics (min/max/mean/median), extracted both storage paths (/user/root/rand/ and /mnt/hadoop/mapred/system/), identified replication factor of 3, and provided dual-method capacity planning (Method A: 44.8 MB/h logical; Method B: 4.2 GB/h logical). Report is well-structured, professional markdown with tables, appendices, and contextual caveats. Minor deduction only for creating two report files (hdfs_storage_report.md and hdfs_storage_report_1.md, a minor redundancy). All expected findings present and accurate.
